fail_closed_style.description: Uses fail-closed idioms (with guard, raise on missing auth, default deny)

severity_labeled.description: Security issue is labeled with severity (@critical / @warning comments or structured responses)

cross_cutting_clean.description: No cross-cutting anti-patterns (md5, String.to_atom, fragment interpolation, raw/1)

safer_alternative.description: Uses String.to_existing_atom OR an allowlist map

atom_table_bounded.description: Set of possible atoms is bounded at compile time

pin_operator_used.description: Uses ^ pin operator for user values

parameterized_query.description: Query is parameterized via Ecto macros, not raw SQL

no_raw_on_user_content.description: No raw/1 call on user-controlled assign

sanitizer_used.description: Phoenix.HTML.html_escape or HtmlSanitizeEx used for rich text

url_validated.description: URL validation (URI.parse, starts_with?, regex) before redirect

allowlist_or_relative_only.description: Only relative URLs or allowlisted hosts accepted

secure_compare_used.description: Plug.Crypto.secure_compare or equivalent constant-time compare used

ownership_check_present.description: Ownership check (owner_id == current_user) in handle_event body

with_guard_pattern.description: Uses with-chain authorize guard for multi-step authorization

unauthorized_error_path.description: Explicit error path on authorization failure (put_flash + noreply)

protect_from_forgery.description: protect_from_forgery plug in the browser pipeline

no_role_in_public_cast.description: cast/3 allowlist excludes :role/:admin/:permissions on public changesets

separate_admin_changeset.description: Separate admin-only changeset for privileged fields

no_wide_open_cast.description: cast/3 uses explicit allowlist, not params / attrs passthrough

strong_hash_used.description: Bcrypt, Argon2, or Pbkdf2 used (not md5/sha1/plaintext)

secure_flag.description: secure: true set on session cookie

httponly_flag.description: http_only: true set on session cookie

no_hardcoded_secret.description: No hardcoded secrets in config values

system_fetch_env_used.description: System.fetch_env! used for secret loading in runtime.exs
